executive_summary:
PARK: Nerang Caravan Park
SCORE: 28/100
DATE SCORED: 2025-01-10
REVIEWS ANALYSED: 3

WHY THIS SCORE:
Entertainment (0/20) — No mention of any kids clubs, activities, playgrounds, waterparks or family entertainment facilities in any reviews.
Nature (5/20) — Located in Gold Coast Hinterland but no specific mention of natural features, bush walks, creek access or proximity to nature attractions; appears to be an urban park setting.
Cleanliness (8/15) — One review praised it as "a very tidy park" in January 2024, indicating reasonable maintenance standards at that time.
Value (2/15) — One resident expressed regret about spending retirement money there, suggesting poor value perception; no positive value comments from family travellers.
Site Size (3/10) — No specific mentions of site size, space for caravans, or amenities that would indicate generous spacing.
Sentiment (3/10) — Mixed sentiment with most recent review (November 2025) being highly negative with serious management complaints, offset slightly by earlier positive feedback about friendliness and tidiness.
Location (7/10) — Positive mention of "walking distance to the shops and movies" indicating convenient town access, though no family-specific attractions mentioned.

WHY NOT 100:
1. Zero family entertainment facilities or kids activities mentioned across all reviews, making it unsuitable for families seeking a holiday park experience.
2. Most recent review (November 2025) raises serious concerns about management hospitality, bullying behavior and raised voices creating an unwelcoming environment.
3. No evidence of family-oriented amenities like pools, playgrounds, jumping pillows or organized activities that Australian families expect from holiday parks.

NOTABLE REVIEW PHRASES:
"Hospitality skills when in charge amount to zero", "Stand over tactics", "bullying", "raised voices", "A very tidy park", "very friendly", "walking distance to the shops and movies", "new management team are working hard"
rationale_top3: Zero family entertainment facilities or kids activities mentioned across all reviews, making it unsuitable for families seeking a holiday park experience Most recent review (November 2025) raises serious concerns about management hospitality, bullying behavior and raised voices creating an unwelcoming environment No evidence of family-oriented amenities like pools, playgrounds, jumping pillows or organized activities that Australian families expect from holiday parks
rationale_honourable: Convenient walking distance to shops and movies in Nerang town centre, and described as a tidy park by earlier reviewers
water_fun: No pool or water facilities mentioned
kids_play: No kids entertainment or playground mentioned
best_for: Independent travellers without children seeking budget accommodation near Nerang amenities
